todoListId.description: Microsoft Graph todoTaskList id (legacy flat key, renamed to `todo.list_id` in v2).

todoListName.description: Display name of the selected todo list (legacy flat key, renamed to `todo.list_name` in v2).

rootFolderId.description: OneDrive driveItem id of the markdown workspace folder.

title: graphdo-ts config (v1, legacy)
description: Pre-versioning on-disk shape of `config.json`. New builds never write this shape; it is documented here so editors and external tools can validate legacy files that have not yet been auto-migrated to v2 by the next graphdo-ts launch.
